results.rendered_html:
upādeya (von dā, dadāti mit upa + ā) adj.
1〉 für sich zu nehmen, zu wählen: bhave saukhyaṃ hitvā śamasukhamupādeyamanagham  ŚĀNTIŚ. 1,21 .
— 2〉 was man wählt, ausgezeichnet, vorzüglich: upādeyatāratamya  SĀH. D. 3,19 . kāvyasyopādeyatvam 2,10 .  MADHUS. _in_ Ind. St. 1,23, ult.

results.rendered_html:
upādeya 1〉 yuktiyuktamupādeyaṃ vacanaṃ bālakādapi anzunehmen, zu beherzigen  Spr. 2492 . Gegens. heya  KAP. 4,23 .  KATHĀS. 72,316 .  SARVADARŚANAS. 33,22 . 34,2 . 45,20 . upādeyatva n. 156,18 . anupādeyatva  SĀH. D. 118,10 . anzuwenden 136,15 .
— 3〉 enthalten in: sargopādeyakathā  SĀH. D. 559 .

results.rendered_html:
upādeya pot. p.
1 Capable of being taken.
2 Capable of being endured;  Māl. 10. 
3 Acceptable, admissible.
4 To be chosen or selected.
5 Excellent, admirable.
